description: Designed and maintained production-grade full stack applications serving enterprise clients, improving feature delivery cycles and system scalability.
Led end-to-end feature development, from technical design and architecture decisions to deployment and maintenance.
Built internal tools and systems to support the adoption and integration of Generative AI capabilities into enterprise applications.
Developed end-to-end Machine Learning pipelines within distributed systems.
Integrated language models into real product workflows and third party platforms.
Collaborated closely with Product Managers, UX/UI Designers, and engineering teams across the development lifecycle.
Contributed to the development and maintenance of one of the largest ecommerce platforms in Mexico, serving over 34 million monthly active users.
Developed and delivered new ecommerce features using a React ecosystem stack, Next.js, Node.js, Hapi.js, Stylus.
Designed and implemented cloud functions (GCP) to automate frontend workflows and processes.
Proposed and implemented frontend performance optimizations improving load time and overall user experience across high-traffic ecommerce flows.
Developed internal tools to improve code quality and development workflows within the frontend team.
Led frontend development for ecommerce projects using modern React based architectures.
Migrated legacy platforms toward modern frontend stacks using Gatsby.js, Apollo GraphQL, and Styled Components.
Built reusable UI components using React, Redux, and Sass.
Implemented unit testing strategies using Jest.
Contributed to CI/CD pipeline implementation using Travis CI and AWS.
Developed backend services and automation tools using Node.js and Express.
Built AWS Lambda functions to automate internal processes.
Implemented open source solutions to replace licensed software and reduce operational costs.
Designed and implemented web based monitoring platforms using HTML5, CSS3, JavaScript, Python, and Linux.
Developed monitoring tools for signaling infrastructure using PHP and web technologies.
Contributed to the modernization of embedded systems using C/C++ for legacy electronic platforms.
